items.title: Written practice
items.body:
Translate the workbook prompts into English. Use the patterns you studied.

Examples:
• Eu quero um copo de água, por favor. / Obrigada.
• Eu não trabalho sozinho, trabalho com meu irmão.
• Eu durmo à tarde. / Eu não durmo de manhã.
• Eu não bebo café à noite. / Eu bebo leite ou chá.
• O que você quer? Eu quero ir à igreja de manhã.

items.prompt: I don’t want to go downtown. I want to go to the movies.
items.answer: Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?

items.prompt: 8- Do you drink a cup of tea in the afternoon? / coffee / milk
items.answer: 7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.

items.prompt: 10- Do you like to drink coffee or juice for breakfast? / coffee – tea / milj – juice
items.answer: 9- Do you play the piano? / guitar / violin.

items.prompt: Valentine’s Day is a special day

items.text: Do you want to go downtown with me tomorrow?
7- Do you study English at night? / in the morning / in the afternoon.
